note: Live/non-live registry for Observatory panels. The autonomous /goal loop EDITS this file (it is NOT frozen) to promote a panel to "live" — but only after that panel's *.demo.test.tsx (calling describeLivePanel) plus the panel-golden + pipeline-coupling gates pass. At the v2 baseline the four v1 panels stay live; the loop builds contributionHeatmap + byProject and adds them here (status "live", route per the frozen oracle REGISTRY). `required` must equal the frozen 6-panel REQUIRED_PANELS in verify.mjs (the loop cannot shrink it); verify:complete additionally requires all six live.
